description: Gunmen abducted 344 schoolboys from the Government Science Secondary School in Kankara.
Security forces opened fire on #EndSARS protesters at the Lekki toll gate. Amnesty International says at least 12 peaceful protesters were killed.
Armed bandits raided a state school in Kagara, abducting 42 people including students, teachers, and family members.
Armed bandits abducted 279 female students from the Government Girls Science Secondary School in Jangebe. All were later released.
Gunmen abducted 121 children from the Bethel Baptist High School in Maramara.
Lagos State recorded 163 murder cases and 189 armed robbery cases in 2023, among the highest of any state.
source: Ministry of Police Affairs / news reports

description: Gunmen abducted 287 students and teachers from a school in Kuriga.
Students were abducted from a school in Gidan Bakuso.
ISWAP killed at least 170 villagers from Mafa ward, Yobe State, after warning residents not to return to their village.
ISWAP carried out a suicide attack on a Nigerian military convoy in the Timbuktu Triangle between Borno and Yobe states, killing 25 soldiers.
